name: wp-ai
description: Explain your content with FAQ, glossary, synonyms and placeholder.
author: Benjamin Klemencic

scripts.start: wp-scripts start faq=./blocks/faq/index.js faq-widget=./blocks/faq-widget/index.js glossary=./blocks/glossary/index.js synonym=./blocks/synonym/index.js placeholder=./blocks/placeholder/index.js src/js/wp-ai-accordion.js src/js/wp-ai-import-ui.js src/js/wp-ai-guided-tour.js --webpack-copy-php
scripts.build:js: wp-scripts build faq=./blocks/faq/index.js faq-widget=./blocks/faq-widget/index.js glossary=./blocks/glossary/index.js synonym=./blocks/synonym/index.js placeholder=./blocks/placeholder/index.js src/js/wp-ai-accordion.js src/js/wp-ai-import-ui.js src/js/wp-ai-search.js src/js/wp-ai-guided-tour.js --webpack-copy-php
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch && npm run i18n:make-pot && npm run i18n:make-json
scripts.version:prerelease: npm version prerelease && npm run i18n:make-pot && npm run i18n:make-json
